843.reason: [If the block is empty (i.e., immediately followed by '}'), this loop is skipped, but cur_token remains at '}' and is never consumed by advancing cnt, causing potential infinite loops or missed token consumption in parent parsing contexts]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [If the block is empty (i.e., immediately followed by '}'), this loop is skipped, but cur_token remains at '}' and is never consumed by advancing cnt, causing potential infinite loops or missed token consumption in parent parsing contexts]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Potential NullPointerException: cur_token could be null if end of input is reached before finding RBRACE]

851.reason: [this.addNode increments cnt and advances cur_token, but only after the while loop; however, if the while loop never runs (empty block), we still need to consume the RBRACE token properly, which this does, BUT the issue is that during the while loop condition check for non-empty blocks, if processBlockItem doesn't advance tokens correctly, it may re-check the same token infinitely]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [this.addNode increments cnt and advances cur_token, but only after the while loop; however, if the while loop never runs (empty block), we still need to consume the RBRACE token properly, which this does, BUT the issue is that during the while loop condition check for non-empty blocks, if processBlockItem doesn't advance tokens correctly, it may re-check the same token infinitely]

234.reason: [This condition fails for single-digit numbers at end of input because it requires pos+1 <= length, and also accesses this.line.charAt(this.pos) without checking bounds when pos == line.length()]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [This condition fails for single-digit numbers at end of input because it requires pos+1 <= length, and also accesses this.line.charAt(this.pos) without checking bounds when pos == line.length()]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [IndexOutOfBoundsException risk: when pos == line.length(), line.charAt(pos) will be out of bounds. Should be 'this.pos < line.length()' instead of 'this.pos + 1 <= line.length()']

1458.reason: [The error line number for missing semicolon should correspond to the line where the last non-terminal before the semicolon is located, but using cnt-1 may not correctly identify the actual line number of the last token in the expression]
